ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-hand, left-hand) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spin) */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name or abbreviation of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  "team_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the team's primary sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Leicestershire won by 50 runs) */,
  "toss_winner" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made after winning the toss (e.g., bat, field) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "match_overs" INTEGER /* Number of overs in the match */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "match_conditions" TEXT /* Weather and pitch conditions during the match */,
  "match_referee" INTEGER /* ID of the match referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_referee FOREIGN KEY ("match_referee") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting performance */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player */,
  "balls_played" INTEGER /* Balls played by the player */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit by the player */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Batting strike rate of the player */,
  "dismissal_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., caught, bowled, run out) */,
  "innings" INTEGER /* Inning in which the performance occurred */,
  "partnership_runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored in partnership with the next batsman */,
  "boundary_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of runs scored in boundaries (fours and sixes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_performances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_performances_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowling performance */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "overs_delivered" INTEGER /* Number of overs delivered by the player */,
  "runs_given" INTEGER /* Runs given by the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "no_balls" INTEGER /* Number of no balls bowled by the player */,
  "wides" INTEGER /* Number of wides bowled by the player */,
  "economy" REAL /* Bowling economy rate of the player */,
  "maiden_overs" INTEGER /* Number of maiden overs bowled */,
  "dot_balls" INTEGER /* Number of dot balls bowled */,
  "wides_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of wides in the total balls bowled */,
  "no_balls_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of no balls in the total balls bowled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_performances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_performances_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_in_matches" (
  "player_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-match entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role_in_match" TEXT /* Role of the player in the match (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "batting_position" INTEGER /* Batting position in the match */,
  "bowling_position" INTEGER /* Bowling position in the match */,
  "fielding_position" TEXT /* Fielding position in the match */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the player to the match (e.g., key wicket, crucial partnership) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_in_matches_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_in_matches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Full name of the umpire */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the umpire */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as an umpire */,
  "umpire_qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the umpire */,
  "umpire_ratings" INTEGER /* Ratings of the umpire from players and coaches */,
  "umpire_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the umpire's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires_in_matches" (
  "umpire_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire-match entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire */,
  "role_in_match" TEXT /* Role of the umpire in the match (e.g., on-field, third umpire) */,
  "umpire_decision_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the umpire's decisions in the match */,
  "umpire_performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the umpire in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_umpires_in_matches_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_umpires_in_matches_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_surface" TEXT /* Type of the venue surface (e.g., grass, artificial) */,
  "venue_elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the venue in meters */,
  "venue_climate" TEXT /* Climate of the venue (e.g., tropical, temperate) */,
  "venue_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the venue's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the match */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken in the match */,
  "man_of_the_match" INTEGER /* ID of the player awarded man of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in attendance */,
  "highest_individual_score" INTEGER /* Highest individual score in the match */,
  "lowest_individual_score" INTEGER /* Lowest individual score in the match */,
  "best_bowling_figures" TEXT /* Best bowling figures in the match */,
  "match_highlights" TEXT /* Summary of key moments in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player */,
  "total_runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "total_balls_played" INTEGER /* Total balls played by the player */,
  "total_fours" INTEGER /* Total number of fours hit by the player */,
  "total_sixes" INTEGER /* Total number of sixes hit by the player */,
  "total_strike_rate" REAL /* Average strike rate of the player */,
  "total_overs_delivered" INTEGER /* Total number of overs delivered by the player */,
  "total_runs_given" INTEGER /* Total runs given by the player */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  "total_no_balls" INTEGER /* Total number of no balls bowled by the player */,
  "total_wides" INTEGER /* Total number of wides bowled by the player */,
  "total_economy" REAL /* Average economy rate of the player */,
  "highest_individual_score" INTEGER /* Highest individual score by the player */,
  "best_bowling_figures" TEXT /* Best bowling figures by the player */,
  "player_highlights" TEXT /* Summary of key achievements by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the team */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of matches won by the team */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of matches lost by the team */,
  "total_ties" INTEGER /* Total number of matches tied by the team */,
  "total_no_results" INTEGER /* Total number of matches with no result */,
  "total_runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team */,
  "total_runs_given" INTEGER /* Total runs given by the team */,
  "total_wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the team */,
  "net_run_rate" REAL /* Net run rate of the team */,
  "highest_team_score" INTEGER /* Highest team score in a match */,
  "lowest_team_score" INTEGER /* Lowest team score in a match */,
  "best_bowling_performance" TEXT /* Best bowling performance by the team */,
  "team_highlights" TEXT /* Summary of key achievements by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, coach, administrator) */,
  "user_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's photo */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
